verdicts.note: Direction is supported (refrigerant phase-out and landfill-enforcement bills, Sierra Club/WCA endorsements), but the axis's core tension is carbon pricing vs. energy affordability, and the dossier contains nothing on the CCA, gas taxes, or energy costs. Record-plus-endorsements on adjacent environmental bills merits medium, not high, on this specific axis.

The candidate dossier never states a spending or oversight position; the score's basis ('runs on reduced government spending') appears only in the contest overview, not in the cited S1, which frames 'government overreach' as an affordability threat. That is an anti-tax/anti-regulation frame, and reading it as an audit-and-restrain spending posture is indirect inference — low confidence at best.
